name: logistics fleet supervisors managing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics fleet supervisors processing 5–15 vehicles/month, inconsistent tracking of vehicle maintenance costs causes budget overruns. We automate cost reporting instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent tracking of vehicle maintenance costs leads to budget overruns.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent tracking of vehicle maintenance costs leads to budget overruns.
